_notes: Single source of truth for all display copy. Edit this file, the site updates.
Image catalog lives separately in artworks.json (one entry per painting).

brand.title: Kalचर by Megha
brand.description: Madhubani, Pichwai, Lippan, Gond and texture art by Megha Seth. Original works and workshops rooted in Indian folk traditions.
brand.logoAlt: Kalcher by Megha. Art elevated by belief

work.title: Original pieces, in progress and finished
work.lead: A growing archive across Madhubani, Pichwai, Lippan, Gond and texture practice. Filter by style. Hover for a closer look.

about.title: On preserving folk traditions through practice
paragraphs: I am an Indian folk artist and workshop facilitator. I work in Madhubani, Pichwai, Lippan, Gond and texture art, forms whose grammar is centuries old and still evolving in the hands of the people who keep them alive.

My practice moves between two rooms: a quiet one where I paint, and a louder one where I teach. The studio side is where I sit with a single piece for as long as it asks. The workshop side is where the same forms meet new hands (children, beginners, professionals on a Saturday afternoon) and become useful in a different way.
about.pullQuote: Folk art is a language. I am one of many speakers, trying to keep the conversation going.
about.asideBody: Original commissions, workshops, and collaborative cultural programming.

workshops.title: Hands-on sessions for every age group
workshops.lead: Workshops are designed to be enjoyable, therapeutic and culturally meaningful. Held for individuals, schools, communities and corporate groups.

contact.title: Commissions, workshops, and conversations
contact.lead: The fastest reply is on Instagram or WhatsApp. Email is best for longer briefs.

customOrders.title: Order a custom painting
customOrders.lead: Tell us about the painting you have in mind. The form opens WhatsApp with your details pre-filled. No email back-and-forth.

workshops.title: Tote bag painting
workshops.blurb: Hand-paint a canvas tote with a folk-art motif of your choice. Beginner friendly, materials provided.

workshops.title: Mirror clay art
workshops.blurb: Make a Lippan-style mud-relief panel with embedded mirrors. Suited to small group sessions.

workshops.title: Paper embroidery
workshops.blurb: Stitch geometric patterns onto card stock to make framed wall pieces. No prior sewing experience needed.

workshops.title: Kids art activities
workshops.blurb: Story-led folk-art sessions for ages 6 to 12. Madhubani, finger painting and craft, weekly or as a holiday camp.

workshops.title: Festive craft
workshops.blurb: Seasonal Diwali, Holi and Raksha Bandhan craft sessions, designed for community and corporate groups.
